steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The blank is the main verb for The Amur River. The question tests subject-verb agreement: find the subject, determine its number, pick the matching verb form.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'flow': plural verb form. The subject The Amur River is singular, so this violates agreement. ✗
  • Choice B — 'flows': singular verb form. Matches the singular subject The Amur River. The intervening clause “which is 2,714 miles long” is just additional information set off by commas—it doesn't change the subject's number. ✓
  • Choice C — 'have flowed': plural verb form (present perfect plural). Also fails agreement with a singular subject. ✗
  • Choice D — 'are flowing': plural verb form (present progressive plural). Also fails agreement with a singular subject. ✗
That matches choice B — B is correct.
